title: Track and address TODO tags
description: TODO tags mark intended improvements or unfinished work but often accumulate over time, leading to technical debt. Unattended TODO tags can indicate incomplete functionality, missed bug fixes, and reduced code quality.
recommendation: Regularly review TODO tags and either implement the planned changes or remove outdated tags.

noncompliant.description: Unaddressed TODO tags accumulate technical debt and indicate incomplete or unfinished functionality.

compliant.description: Implementing planned improvements and removing outdated TODO tags maintains code quality and prevents technical debt accumulation.

checks.message: TODO/FIXME tag found - consider implementing the planned changes or removing outdated tags
